blocks.heading: Financial & Operational KPIs
blocks.citation: Internal Management Reports (FY25) | CRISIL Rating Report (2025)

blocks.heading: Profitability Milestones
verbose_bullets: Achieved **record PAT** of ₹83 cr in FY25, a 10-year high.
Secured **₹115 cr** in new order wins, signaling robust demand.
Targeting **50% export revenue** share to de-risk domestic cycles.

blocks.heading: Operational Scaling
verbose_bullets: Executing a **₹25 cr Capex** program to modernize production lines.
Commissioned **₹7 cr** in new projects to boost capacity utilization.
Implemented **SAP ERP** to automate workflows and enhance audit rigor.

blocks.heading: Market Expansion
verbose_bullets: Secured a major **MNC Axle contract** adding ₹10 cr annually.
Expanding **European footprint** via a dedicated German subsidiary.
Focusing on **high-margin** turbocharger and driveline components.

blocks.heading: Institutional Excellence
verbose_bullets: Leveraging **four decades** of engineering excellence to maintain a dominant position in the precision forging market.
Implemented **compliance software** to drive operational transparency and institutionalize audit-ready workflows.
Maintains a **blue-chip client base** including global leaders in automotive, construction, and power generation sectors.

blocks.heading: Financial Resilience
verbose_bullets: Maintains a **moderate risk profile** with a 0.75x gearing ratio, providing significant headroom for debt-funded expansion.
Demonstrated **EBITDA expansion** potential through cost-control measures and improvements in operational efficiency.
Strong **interest coverage** of 2.6x ensures sufficient earnings to service debt while funding aggressive growth initiatives.

blocks.heading: Precision Engineering Visual
blocks.detailed_image_prompt: Midjourney style, 8k, cinematic lighting, a close-up of a high-precision forged steel engine component, metallic textures, glowing orange highlights from heat treatment, clean corporate aesthetic, shallow depth of field.

chart_data.title: Annual New Order Wins (INR Cr)
chart_data.strategic_analysis: Order wins surged by **53% YoY**, reflecting successful penetration into MNC accounts and driveline segments.

chart_data.title: Export Growth Target (%)
chart_data.strategic_analysis: Aggressive pivot to **international markets** aims to capture higher margins and mitigate domestic cyclicality.

blocks.heading: Asset Base & Capacity
verbose_bullets: Operating **5 state-of-the-art plants** with integrated heat treatment and precision machining capabilities.
Integrated **Lean Manufacturing** principles via a proprietary operating system to minimize waste.
Advanced **CAD/CAM facilities** and CNC tool rooms enable rapid prototyping and value engineering.

blocks.heading: Mission-Critical Portfolio
verbose_bullets: Specializing in **fracture-split connecting rods** and turbocharger parts for high-performance engines.
Diversified across **Industrial verticals** including marine, railways, and renewable power generation.
Strategic focus on **complex driveline parts** which command higher pricing power and client stickiness.

blocks.heading: Manufacturing Floor
blocks.detailed_image_prompt: Photorealistic, 8k, aerial view of a modern industrial manufacturing plant, clean white floors, robotic arms, organized assembly lines, soft natural lighting through skylights, no logos.

chart_data.title: Projected Revenue Upside (%)
chart_data.strategic_analysis: The Entity is positioned to deliver **25%+ annual revenue growth** through favorable product mix shifts.

blocks.heading: Strategic Pivot
verbose_bullets: Strategic pivot towards **high-margin segments** like Turbochargers to enhance overall EBITDA profile.
Capitalizing on the **$468B global aftermarket** through a dedicated European sales and logistics hub.
Leveraging **long-term OEM relationships** to secure recurring revenue and high-barrier-to-entry contracts.

blocks.heading: Investment Merits
verbose_bullets: Robust **promoter holding of 58.8%** ensures strong alignment with long-term value creation and strategic stability.
Significant **operating leverage** available as new capacity from the FY26 Capex program comes online in high-demand segments.
Proven ability to pass through **raw material volatility** to customers, protecting margins in a cyclical industrial environment.

blocks.heading: Global Supply Chain
blocks.detailed_image_prompt: Cinematic, 8k, abstract world map with glowing nodes connecting India, Germany, and the USA, representing a global supply chain, dark blue background, sleek digital lines.
